tasks.title: Set up Telegram bot with grammY, long polling, and command/callback routing
Implement SQLite schema for users, events, duels, predictions, stakes, and leaderboard view
Create resolver job with tick logic for auto-resolution and restart resilience
Implement per-chat state machine for user flows (idle → new_duel → ... → confirming)
Handle user registration/authentication via /start with reputation initialization
Implement New Duel Type Selection screen with event category keyboard
Implement New Duel Search Term input with event source validation
Implement Title/Description input with character limit enforcement
Implement Deadline input with past-time rejection and retry prompt
Implement Outcome Options input with 2-6 distinct option validation
Implement Duel Confirmation screen with final review and creation
Implement /predict flow with re-predict replacement logic and stake locking
Implement /duels command with timezone-aware rendering and event type filters
Implement /leaderboard with reputation floor enforcement (0 minimum) and rank calculation
Implement /challenge command with challenge message, buttons, and chat context tracking
Implement /export command with CSV format (8 fields) and DM attachment delivery
Implement 1-hour unresolved duel notifications to admin and duel creator
Integrate crypto (CoinGecko), sports (API-Sports), and weather (OpenWeatherMap) APIs for event resolution
